title: Kingswood Golf Estate’s new community centre and clubhouse nears completion - A whole new chapter awaits
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Get ready! Something big and...
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - Get ready! Something big and beautiful is brewing at Kingswood! The countdown has officially begun as we gear up to unveil the all-new Kingswood Community Centre/Clubhouse - opening 1 September 2025. Construction is in full swing, and with completion on track for early August, we’re putting the final touches on what promises to be a game-changer - not just for golf lovers, but for everyone who calls Kingswood home.


> This isn’t just a clubhouse - it’s a destination. Picture this: a brand-new, family friendly restaurant where neighbours become friends, kids laugh and play nearby, and delicious meals bring people together.


Add to that a fun-filled children’s play area designed to keep the little ones entertained while the adults relax on the sunny outdoor patio. It’s the kind of place where Saturday mornings start with coffee and end with ice cream, where date nights are just steps from home, and where every family gathering feels extra special.

And of course, for golfers, the clubhouse
will include a well-stocked top-class pro
shop, new golf carts, a dedicated golfer’s
lounge and bar, locker rooms, a halfway
house and breathtaking views over our
unique courses. Whether you’re a seasoned
pro or just getting started, your game is
about to level up in style.

This exciting new development is more than just bricks and mortar; it reflects Kingswood’s vision to be the preferred, secure, family-friendly residential golf estate in the Garden Route. Here, luxury living meets natural beauty, and our commitment to protecting wildlife and indigenous flora ensures every walk, picnic or golf round is something to savour.

The brand-new Kingswood Golf Club, operated by Kingswood HOA Properties (Pty) Ltd (fully owned by the HOA), has officially been registered. Golfers, take note: Current rounds or memberships with KGO must be used by 31 August 2025, as they won’t carry over.

Now’s the perfect time to apply for
membership with the new Kingswood Golf
Club by completing this quick online form:
https://bit.ly/4dBfyow.

Have questions? We’re here to help! Reach out at [email protected] or call 0861 72 71 70. Whether you’re chasing birdies or burgers, playdates or peaceful views, the new Kingswood Community Centre/Clubhouse is your new favourite place to be.

Visit our brand-new website for a more
comprehensive overview of the estate:
www.kingswood.co.za

We can’t wait to welcome you to the future
of Kingswood.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
